chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1421 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.6407/2025 (151 CPC) 3. For hearing of main case 24.11.2025 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General a/w Muhammad Akram DSP Legal District Ghotki, Ins Naveed Akbar Pirzada on behalf of DIG Sukkur ************** In compliance with the directions contained in the order dated 21.10.2025, the learned AAG has placed on record a report with certain documents, same is taken on record. From the perusal of said statement, it appears that status in FIR No.100/2023, U/S 384, 427, 403, 337-A(i), F(i) 506/2 PPC of PS Babarloi, against petitioner Saeed Ahmed Jatoi son of Mehar Ali Jatoi, received from SSP Office Khairpur vide letter No. CRO/310/2025, dated 17.07.2025, has accordingly been updated in CRMS record vide No.675273 respectively as acquitted. Keeping in view the referred statement, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as not pressed along with all pending application(s) J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
